texto: Human beings were so full of emotion. That was the problem. They could kill for a reason that to them felt like the only reason and to the rest of the rational thinking population felt like no reason at all.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Paula Daly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Human beings were so full of emotion. That was the problem. They could kill for a reason that to …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, murder, reason pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: This is what parenting involved: hard decisions. She was his mother, she reminded herself. He didn't have to like her.
